welcome.title: Welcome to PrismMD
welcome.subtitle: Open a document or folder to start reading. Markdown, PDF, CSV, JSON and XLSX are all supported — drag and drop works too.
welcome.tip: Tip: Press {{shortcut}} to open the command palette

unsupported.title: Unsupported file format
unsupported.body: PrismMD's Library currently supports Markdown, PDF, CSV, JSON and XLSX. Try opening one of those.

xlsx.parseErrorBody: The file may be password-protected or corrupted.

sidebar.relatedSoon: Related documents will appear here once documents share entities.

graphView.title: Knowledge Graph
graphView.loadingSlow: Still connecting to Neo4j — check the Bolt URI if this hangs.
graphView.errorAuth: Authentication failed — check your Neo4j credentials.
graphView.errorUnreachable: Neo4j is unreachable — check the Bolt URI and that the database is running.
graphView.autoScopedToGlobal: No entities for this document — switched to Global scope.

empty.title: No graph data yet
empty.body: Focus a node or switch scope to load a different view.
empty.noReports: Save a document to the Knowledge Graph to populate this view.

disabled.title: Knowledge Graph is disabled
disabled.body: Enable it in Settings → Knowledge Graph and configure a Neo4j connection to use this view.

entityPanel.empty: Click a node in the graph, or a linked entity in a document, to open its profile here.
entityPanel.noData: No data for this entity yet.

ai.title: AI Providers
ai.description: Configure API keys for AI assistants. Cloud and local models supported.
ai.localNote: No API key needed. Ensure Ollama is running locally.
ai.customNote: Any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Enter the base URL, API key, and model name.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.description: Control data privacy and network access
privacy.privacyModeDesc: Block all external API calls. Only local models (Ollama) are allowed.
privacy.focusModeDesc: Dim background document when AI is generating responses.
privacy.clearMemoryDesc: Remove all stored conversation history and preferences.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Connect AI tools via the Model Context Protocol. Format matches Claude Desktop's `mcpServers` config — you can paste existing entries.

about.title: About & Updates
about.subtitle: Check for new releases and apply them with one click.
about.statusIdle: Up-to-date status will appear here after the first check.
about.statusAvailable: Update available: {{version}} — downloading in the background.
about.statusOffline: You appear to be offline — connect to the internet and try again.
about.devNote: Auto-update is active in packaged macOS / Windows builds with a signed GitHub Release. Dev runs and Linux packages skip it.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Extend PrismMD with community-contributed commands, sidebar panels, and markdown renderers.
plugins.trustWarning: Plugins run with full access to your PrismMD session. Only install plugins you trust.
plugins.externalEmpty: No external plugins found. Drop a plugin folder into the location above, then click Reload.

insightgraph.title: Knowledge Graph
insightgraph.description: Save documents as nodes in a Neo4j knowledge graph and ask questions across them. Uses your active AI provider for extraction. Requires a running Neo4j instance.
insightgraph.enableDesc: Turn on graph-RAG features. When enabled, the AI assistant gets extra context from your ingested documents.
insightgraph.uriInvalid: Enter a valid Bolt URI, e.g. bolt://localhost:7687
insightgraph.providerWarning: Knowledge Graph uses your active AI provider. Anthropic and Google are not OpenAI-compatible — switch to OpenAI, Ollama, or Custom to use this feature.
insightgraph.noReports: No documents ingested yet. Use the command palette or right-click a file in the explorer to save it to the graph.
insightgraph.entityLinkingDesc: Underline known entity names in the reader. Click an underlined entity to open its profile in the side panel. Costs one DOM walk per document open.

related.noFile: Open a document to see what's related.
related.notIngested: Save this document to the Knowledge Graph to see related documents.
related.none: No other documents share entities with this one yet.

contradictionBanner.title: {{total}} contradictory claims found across {{entities}} entities
contradictionBanner.body: Open an entity to see the conflicting statements side by side.

docSummary.title: AI Summary
docSummary.buildGraph: Build knowledge graph for this document

agent.title: AI Assistant
agent.noDocument: Open a document to start chatting with AI
agent.error: An error occurred. Please check your API key and try again.
agent.privacyBadgeTooltip: Cloud providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Custom) are disabled while Privacy Mode is on. Only Ollama is available.
agent.onboardingHint: Connect an AI provider to start chatting with this document.

updater.readyTitle: A new version is ready — click to restart and install.
updater.readyWithVersion: Version {{version}} is ready — click to restart and install.

filetree.ingestFolder: Ingest whole folder into Graph ({{count}} files)
